Tree_Sap.description: A natural adhesive used in concrete and epoxy.
Tree_Sap.flavorText: Whether you subscribe to the cohesion-tension or multiforce theories of sap transport, osmotic pressure gradients or axial potentials, it makes no difference to how useful it is.

Thermos.description: Like a Canteen, but with better thermal protection

Thatch_Floor.description: A lightweight, quickly crafted floor piece.
Thatch_Floor.flavorText: Simple to craft and plentiful, thatch construction provides rapid shelter to those on the move, or in need of rapid, if not particularly durable protection.

Thatch_Wall.description: Lightweight walls, doorways and windows (Hold \'R\' for variants).
Thatch_Wall.flavorText: Simple to craft and plentiful, thatch construction provides rapid shelter to those on the move, or in need of rapid, disposable protection.

Thatch_Halfpiece.description: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
Thatch_Halfpiece.flavorText: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

Thatch_Half_Pitch.flavorText: A two-part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

Thatch_Ramp.description: A light, easily crafted ramp for roofing or access.
Thatch_Ramp.flavorText: Whether you employ this for a roof, or simply for ease of access, the thatch ramp is simple to make and easy to carry, but provides only limited environmental protection.

Titanium_Ore.description: High purity ore, strong and extremely durable

Titanium_Ingot.flavorText: Once thought to be forged by sad-eyed lemurs in the underground kingdom of Booyaka-Woot, this was conclusively disproved in the early 22nd century.

Thatch_Beam.description: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
Thatch_Beam.flavorText: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

Thatch_TrapDoor.flavorText: Attaches to a thatch floor trapdoor.

Armor_Bench.description: Craft and assemble various protective items and garments.
Armor_Bench.flavorText: Basic fabric, leatherwork and armorer\'s tools allow you to fashion a range of clothing and protective wear from natural materials and fibers.

Titanium_Pickaxe.description: An extremely strong, lightweight mining tool.

Titanium_Axe.description: A savagely sharp, extremely durable hand axe.

Rug_Weave_Thin.flavorText: Four trillion kilometers from home, these details can make all the difference.

Rug_Weave_Thick.description: A plainly woven, thick pile fiber mat.

Trophy_Bench.flavorText: Make a record of your victories, because planet is barely aware of you.

Taxidermy_Knife.description: A small, strong precision cutting tool.
Taxidermy_Knife.flavorText: Perfect for precise cuts to preserve that \'still breathing\' look.

Titanium_Arrow.flavorText: Whether on Icarus or Earth, hunters continue to value skills for stealth, control and intimacy of the kill.

Titanium_Knife.description: A blade as hard and lightweight as life itself.
Titanium_Knife.flavorText: Named for the Greek Titans, titanium is harder than steel, corrosion resistant and extremely light. Its only flaw is brittleness, meaning it falls short of its indestructible reputation.

Titanium_Sickle.description: A resilient version of an antique design.
Titanium_Sickle.flavorText: Sharper and stronger, it swings further, delivering more resources with each swipe.

Titanium_Spear.flavorText: Extremely strong and lightweight, the titanium spear is a devastating hunting and protective tool in well-trained hands.

Thatch_Roof_Corner.description: A lightweight insert for angled roofs.

Titanium_Bolt.flavorText: "When you\'ve got two tons of polar bear lumbering towards you across the ice, you suddenly realise a bullet\'s not going to cut it. But a titanium bolt through the eye, that\'s another story." - Sol Berlinski

GreenTea.description: Unprocessed leaves from a variant of the common tea tree.

Faction_Mission_WallDrill.description: An industrial-grade, portable electric mining rig designed for horizontal aperture drilling.
Faction_Mission_WallDrill.flavorText: This micro-derrick rig was adapted from Inaris-designed asteroid mining equipment used in the early 22nd century.

Delivery_Object.description: A fragile flechette flask containing temperature-sensitive terraforming enzyme payload.
Delivery_Object.flavorText: Following the ban on terraforming, Inaris continued to secretly pursue the technology under the protection of their owner-directors, Uniao.

Titanium_Hammer.description: A durable and reliable tool for structure repair.
Titanium_Hammer.flavorText: Counter the forces of nature with a little violence of your own.

Target_Dummy.description: Can be used to test out Damage Per Second.
Target_Dummy.flavorText: If only real bears would stay this still.

Target_DPSDummy.description: Can be used to test out Damage Per Second.
Target_DPSDummy.flavorText: If only real bears would stay this still.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Titanium_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of Titanium from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Titanium_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Head_Attachment_Boss_Tracker.description: An attachment that allows the tracking of world bosses and improves damage to enemy weak points.
Head_Attachment_Boss_Tracker.flavorText: Can be equipped to head armor at an Alteration Bench.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Ammo_Highlight_.description: An attachment that increases the speed of projectiles.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Ammo_Highlight_.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid bow, or crossbow.

Tomato.description: A staple in many diets that can be eaten raw or cooked.
Tomato.flavorText: Classed as a fruit, not a vegetable.

Titanium_Throwing_Knife.description: A blade as hard and lightweight as life itself.
Titanium_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: Named for the Greek Titans, titanium is harder than steel, corrosion resistant and extremely light. Its only flaw is brittleness, meaning it falls short of its indestructible reputation.

Titanium_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: Extremely strong and lightweight, the titanium spear is a devastating hunting and protective tool in well-trained hands.

Titanium_Crossbow.description: A powerful weapon to help you tackle whatever Icarus throws at you.
Titanium_Crossbow.flavorText: Classier than a gun, more exciting than a bow.

Fish_03_Var4.description: A common saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_03_Var4.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_04_Var2.description: A common saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_04_Var2.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_06.description: An uncommon saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_06.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_11_Var4.description: A rare saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_11_Var4.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Shield_Titanium.description: A heavy-duty shield made from ultra-strong titanium, providing excellent protection against threats.
Shield_Titanium.flavorText: With this in hand, you\'re ready for anything.

Tackle_Box.description: A place to store your Fishing Lures and latest catch.

Titanium_Plate.description: A small plate of titanium which can be used in a variety of electronics and machinery.

Mission_Tomato.description: A tomato spliced with the genes of a goat for surviving harsh climates.
Mission_Tomato.flavorText: Classed as a fruit, not a vegetable.

Meta_GreenTea_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Tea Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Tomato_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Tomato Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Titanium_Ore_Stack_100.description: High purity ore, strong and extremely durable

Teenage_Caveworm_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Teenage Caveworm.
Teenage_Caveworm_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Terrenus_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Terrenus.
Terrenus_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Teenage_Caveworm_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Terrenus_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Tusker_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Tusker.
Tusker_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Tusker_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Smoked_Freshwater_Fillet.description: A savory snack made by smoking and preserving tender fillets of freshwater fish.
Smoked_Freshwater_Fillet.flavorText: UDA reports have mixed results on the flavor.

Titanium_Shovel.description: Can be used to dig dirt mounds on dirt or grass, or shovel snow off your roof. Provides moderate storm resistance to your crops.
Titanium_Shovel.flavorText: Shift snow, or bury a friend.

Workshop_Shovel.description: Can be used to dig dirt mounds on dirt or grass, or shovel snow off your roof. Provides heavy storm resistance to your crops and causes them not to wither after they are fully grown.
Workshop_Shovel.flavorText: Shift snow, or bury a friend.

Shotgun_T4.description: An advanced weapon that packs a real punch.

Egg_Salad.description: Considered a delicacy back on earth.
Egg_Salad.flavorText: An interesting mix of protein and fruit.

Dog_Head_D1.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_D1.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dog_Trophy_D1_1.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dog_Trophy_D1_2.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Thatch_Railing_Gate.description: Light, easily crafted railings with a gate.

Dev_Transform_Tool.description: Left click to select in-world actor to transform. Use the popup to fine-tune location, rotation, and scale

Teddy_Bear.description: A roughly made, well-loved teddy bear.

Toilet.description: An old toilet - rendered useless by the envirosuits.
Toilet.flavorText: If you are looking for the classic experience.

TriangulationBeacon.description: A short range detection device used for triangulating biosignatures.
TriangulationBeacon.flavorText: Tracks the biggest source of provided materials.

Sickle_Attachment_Harvest_Seeds.description: An attachment that allows the collection of Seeds directly from plants when harvesting.
Sickle_Attachment_Harvest_Seeds.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid sickle at an Alteration Bench.

Prop_Test_Tube_Rack.description: A handy device for holding and storing test tubes.

LegendaryWeapon_Bow.description: A Prototype Upgradeable Bow created via studying of the Rimetusk mutated mammoth.
LegendaryWeapon_Bow.flavorText: A Masterwork Bow - Created by our Friends at Norex.

Truffle.description: A rare fungus prized for its strong aroma and flavour.
Truffle.flavorText: A delicacy worth more than its weight in gold.

Truffle_Focaccia.description: A soft, savoury bread laced with truffle flavour.
Truffle_Focaccia.flavorText: A bread that elevates survival into art.

Truffle_Pasta.description: Rich pasta enhanced with the depth of truffle.
Truffle_Pasta.flavorText: A dish that tastes like victory itself.
